spoilers.text: Boruto fans from 2017 to January 2026:“Boruto fandom needs a leaker. We want to have a leaker who can leak 6-7 panels and create a massive hype for the next new Boruto chapters!!“ Boruto fans since a random day on February 2026:“ All leakers should die!🤬“ Y‘all are so funny #BORUTO

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 The difference in levels is immediately obvious here, simply the difference between day and night, damn... Loki is a flying ancient weapon, able to nuke any island off the map... #FEARLO
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 The difference in levels is immediately obvious here, simply the difference between day and night, damn... Loki is a flying ancient weapon, able to nuke any island off the map... #FEARLOKI

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 It seems like Imu will be in charge next chapter. We haven't seen Brook at all; has he already been defeated? That wouldn't be surprising, but it's sure to make Luffy incredibly angry...
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 It seems like Imu will be in charge next chapter. We haven't seen Brook at all; has he already been defeated? That wouldn't be surprising, but it's sure to make Luffy incredibly angry... Imu vs. Luffy and Loki starts soon!!

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 How insane is this feat, please? I didn't notice it, but the blast is big enough to blast the entire Yggdrasil tree of Elbaph... Loki himself should be island-sized; his attack with Adva
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1175 How insane is this feat, please? I didn't notice it, but the blast is big enough to blast the entire Yggdrasil tree of Elbaph... Loki himself should be island-sized; his attack with Advanced CoC would easily be able to destroy an entire island...

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1175 Even the MMA monsters are running away... Please look at the Lightning breath attack, it looks sooo good...🔥🔥🔥

misc.title: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Command
misc.text: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Commander of the German Army, LTG Christian Freuding, concluded a visit to Israel, hosted by MG Nadav Lotan, Commander of the IDF Ground Forces. For the first time, the two signed a formal cooperation agreement, expanding collaboration—a major milestone in the strategic partnership between Israel and Germany. Together, we stand ready to confront shared challenges and deepen our military cooperation for the future. — https://nitter.net/IDF/status/2024762807149854959#m

misc.title: Throwback to when Martin Luther King Jr held the first ever copy of Boruto TBV in his hands. “Boruto isn’t only a great story for showing political power in the world but also how a world without raci
misc.text: Throwback to when Martin Luther King Jr held the first ever copy of Boruto TBV in his hands. “Boruto isn’t only a great story for showing political power in the world but also how a world without racism can move people’s life. Read Boruto!” - Martin Luther King Jr (1965) #BORUTO

misc.title: Can somebody explain this in Naruto/Boruto terms? #BORUTO #NARUTO World Affairs (@World_Affairs11) BREAKING: Israeli PM Netanyahu is facing critical health condition, he has blood cancer , diagnosed y
misc.text: Can somebody explain this in Naruto/Boruto terms? #BORUTO #NARUTO World Affairs (@World_Affairs11) BREAKING: Israeli PM Netanyahu is facing critical health condition, he has blood cancer , diagnosed yesterday. Community note: No evidence confirms Israeli PM Netanyahu has blood cancer; his February 2025 medical report states he is cancer-free with normal blood tests. jpost.com/health-and-wel… tps.co.il/articles/netan… — https://nitter.net/World_Affairs11/status/2023586079522386363#m
